narrative:
Lafayette (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,184 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.3 percentage points.
